stemHtml: In order to avoid areas with a high concentration of ice crystals, and thereby avoid ice crystal icing, a pilot should fly at an altitude (1) _____ and avoid flying (2) _____.

options.a: (1) above the tropopause; (2) through the high altitude cloud at a warm front.
options.b: (1) above the tropopause; (2) through, or downwind of, a CB anvil.
options.c: (1) below the tropopause; (2) through, or downwind of, a CB anvil.
options.d: (1) below the tropopause; (2) through the high altitude cloud at a warm front.
